title: Eva 30 Trailers post 11 17
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] Eva 3.0 Trailers (post-11/17)             Quote Post by xenosaga » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:52 pm [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?feature=player_embedded&v=VG9vSrCHk78[/url] This is brand new TV CM for Q with Utada Hikaru's new song. Its actually the first official footage of all the new stuff in the movie, including new character designs and new Eva designs.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:54 pm Looks sweet Shinji looks like a pig bawwling there. I feel slightly bad for saying that.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Nov 18, 2012 5:04 pm Looks like Shinji and Kaworu are rehearsing the classic kirk/spock style window love. Also, I'm surprised to see that expression on Rei, it gives me hope that she's not the reported complete vegetable. Astounding how they managed to keep such a big twist under wraps so far.

[]:             Quote Post by Ynnead » Sun Nov 18, 2012 5:51 pm Kinda confused by Rei's Expression considering what we know about her in 3.0, makes me wonder.

[]:             Quote Post by Hatsumi92 » Sun Nov 18, 2012 5:54 pm The animation continues to be absolutely beautiful.

[]:             Quote Post by shinji_ryoji_89 » Sun Nov 18, 2012 6:00 pm Why is this in 2.35:1? Is the movie actually in that aspect ratio or just this TV spot?

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sun Nov 18, 2012 6:00 pm 0:03 - The Wunder's engines fire red liquid above and below before asplodin'. 0:05 - some sort of barrier being hit by that oh-to-familiar wave of red stuff? 0:07 - what 15 years of continuous puberty does to one's temperament. 0:09 - Mari on the phone to her agent trying to find out where that planned B story about her rocking Kaji's world went. 0:10 - Ladies and gentlemen - thats the shot. Right there. Thats why we got fan art in a matter of hours. Thats why Karowu is now Bishonen Space Jesus.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Nov 18, 2012 6:00 pm AWW MAN, AWW MAN It really feels like Eva is heading into a new exciting direction now. Can't wait to see how Asuka vs Shinji works out in this sequel with what happened in EoE and all. What is that on the floor? Swooping by, it kinda reminded me of this scene, but on closer inspection they look like skulls. But even then, it kind of looks like a photo rather than something that was drawn Not sure what to think of the slightly off model screaming/perspectives though

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sun Nov 18, 2012 6:03 pm @IO I believe those are the Eva sized Skulls on the floor people have described.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Nov 18, 2012 6:04 pm IO: tis a Sea of Giant Skulls

[]:             Quote Post by xenosaga » Sun Nov 18, 2012 6:04 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: What is that on the floor? Not sure what to think of the slightly off model screaming/perspectives though

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Nov 18, 2012 6:05 pm Hmm, that would make sense. But those skulls look kind of out of place, don't they? The perspective looks kind of weird and the colors and lines makes it look like one of them real-lifepictures SHAFT inserts

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sun Nov 18, 2012 6:11 pm Yes, skulls. Confirmation from art book scans. They appear to be too big to be human skulls. I'm plumping for saying they are the skulls of 'eva-sized beings'.

[]:             Quote Post by Noriko is my wife » Sun Nov 18, 2012 6:32 pm shinji_ryoji_89 wrote: Why is this in 2.35:1? Is the movie actually in that aspect ratio or just this TV spot?

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Sun Nov 18, 2012 6:56 pm Jayfive wrote: 0:03 - The Wunder's engines fire red liquid above and below before asplodin'. 0:05 - some sort of barrier being hit by that oh-to-familiar wave of red stuff? 0:07 - what 15 years of continuous puberty does to one's temperament. 0:09 - Mari on the phone to her agent trying to find out where that planned B story about her rocking Kaji's world went. 0:10 - Ladies and gentlemen - thats the shot. Right there. Thats why we got fan art in a matter of hours. Thats why Karowu is now Bishonen Space Jesus.

[]:             Quote Post by ohnasti » Sun Nov 18, 2012 7:19 pm Does somebody know the entire song name used?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Nov 18, 2012 7:21 pm ohnasti wrote: Does somebody know the entire song name used?

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sun Nov 18, 2012 8:15 pm Also: I don't know whats happening there but Q-Rei's expression utterly breaks my heart. Its like seeing the Episode 6 smile for the first time again.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Nov 18, 2012 8:25 pm Jayfive wrote: Also: I don't know whats happening there but Q-Rei's expression utterly breaks my heart. Its like seeing the Episode 6 smile for the first time again.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Sun Nov 18, 2012 8:27 pm I really liked this new TV spot. Good song, too.
summary:
[]: [SPOILERS] Eva 3.0 Trailers (post-11/17)             Quote Post by xenosaga » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:52 pm [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?feature=player_embedded&v=VG9vSrCHk78[/url] This is brand new TV CM for Q with Utada Hikaru's new song. Its actually the first official footage of all the new stuff in the movie, including new character designs and new Eva designs.
